scripts.smoke:local: command -v k6 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '⚠️  k6 not found on host — install grafana/k6 or use the Docker path: ./bin/punch run smoke'; exit 127; }; echo '⚠️  HOST k6 smoke (not Docker): scoped pre-check that the k6 load test runs. Prefer <=5m. NOT the evidence/CI path — use ./bin/punch run smoke. Duration override: K6_DURATION=1m'; esbuild src/tests/smoke.ts --bundle --platform=browser --target=es2015 --format=esm --external:k6 --external:'k6/*' --outdir=dist/ && k6 run --duration "${K6_DURATION:-30s}" dist/smoke.js
